site.title: Osteoperiology
site.subtitle: Curated news from the periodontal and implant literature
site.author: Dr. Ernesto Bruschi
site.description: Weekly AI-curated summaries of open access articles in periodontology and dental implantology

home.noArticles: No articles yet. The first update will arrive next Monday.

article.aiDisclaimer: This summary was generated by AI from the original abstract. Always refer to the original publication for clinical decisions.

about.title: About
about.text: Osteoperiology is a curated feed of the latest open access research in periodontology and dental implantology. Every week, new articles from leading journals are automatically summarized in English and Italian.

footer.disclaimer: AI-generated summaries for educational purposes. Not a substitute for professional judgment.
